headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 2, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs edged the Arizona Diamondbacks 6-5 in a close matchup, with Geraldo Perdomo leading the Diamondbacks with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. The Texas Rangers secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with Tyler Alexander earning the win and Jacob Latz notching the save. The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-1 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Jacob Misiorowski earning the win after 5.1 innings of scoreless relief.

Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Matt Brash of the Seattle Mariners, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right lat inflammation. Ryan Helsley of the Baltimore Orioles has also been placed on the 15-day injured list with right elbow inflammation. Brandon Woodruff of the Milwaukee Brewers has been placed on the 15-day injured list with right shoulder inflammation.

The Detroit Tigers have bolstered their infield depth with the acquisition of Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers have also made a trade, acquiring Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs edged the Arizona Diamondbacks 6-5 in a close matchup. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rangers Edge Tigers in Thrilling 5-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Texas Rangers secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with Tyler Alexander earning the win and Jacob Latz notching the save.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall to Pirates in Dominant 9-1 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds suffered a one-sided defeat, losing 9-1 to the Pittsburgh Pirates. Henry Davis led the Pirates' offense with two home runs and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Brewers Take Down Nationals 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-1 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Jacob Misiorowski earning the win after 5.1 innings of scoreless relief. William Contreras led the Brewers' offense with 4 hits and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Matt Brash Placed on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners right-handed pitcher Matt Brash has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right lat inflammation, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have acquired infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. Short joins the Tigers' roster, bolstering their infield depth.
